name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Flatiron is an indoor golf venue featuring Trackman technology in a full-service bar and restaurant setting. The facility offers 10 simulator bays for playing a variety of virtual golf courses, from PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach to minigames, alongside a high-tech practice environment. Membership provides free play and significant discounts on food, drinks, lessons, and events, while walk-in hourly rentals are available for non-members. The location combines golf with social amenities including a full bar, chef-inspired menu, shuffleboard, and ping pong, creating a casual and entertaining atmosphere for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman technology provides accurate data and access to 200+ world-class courses
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu create a social golf experience
Membership offers free play and discounts on lessons, food, and events
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible to everyone
Late-night hours and special events like Super Sunday game day rentals

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with chef-inspired menu, including wings, pizzas, and appetizers
Full-service bar with drink packages and specials

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman technology with high-speed cameras in 10 simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them on-site. Club fitting services are also available with certified coaches using Trackman technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full-service bar and kitchen with a chef-inspired menu and drink packages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies depending on your group size and pace, but most 18-hole rounds typically take 2-3 hours in a simulator setting.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers kids' parties, junior clinics, and has a casual atmosphere suitable for families. Special events and party packages are available for children.
